entry.title: Re: How to use CDS Access Control (Authorization Object Check in CDS Views)
entry.content:
https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-data-models/cds-authorization-concept

CDS roles restrict the read access only for the CDS entity they reference, and there is no automatic inheritance. When a CDS entity is used as a data source in another CDS entity, the consuming CDS entity does not inherit any access controls from the underlying entity. ABAP SQL queries on the overlying entity have full access to the data, regardless of the access restrictions of the underlying entity. In other words, there is no automatic inheritance of CDS access controls to higher layers of a CDS data model. You must define access control for each individual entity that you want to protect.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Free Text Field/Dimension?
entry.content: Is it possible to create a dimension that acts as a free text field? For certain projects, payment from the customer are contingent on certain milestones being met but what those milestones are called changes from project to project depending on the nature of the project and the contract.  My solution now is to create a dimension called 'Milestone' that the teams can load data to and they will have to tell me what to add every time they start a new project but was hoping to find a more efficient solution where the teams can be more independent and not wait on me to fulfill the new milestone name request.

entry.title: Re: SAPB1 Single sign On SLD greyed out
entry.content: Obrigado!

entry.title: Elevate your business with the power of AI! (Webinar)
entry.content:
Are you ready to elevate your business with the power of AI?

The SAP Integration and Certification Center (ICC) is thrilled to invite our valued partners to our webinar that delves into the transformative potential of artificial intelligence. This webinar is designed to provide you with the knowledge and tools necessary to innovate and grow within the SAP ecosystem utilizing AI.

 

Agenda:

  1. Welcome and Kick-off

    • We’ll start with an introduction to the webinar, outlining the key topics and objectives of the session.

  2. AI Expert Session

    • Engage with industry-leading AI experts as they explore the latest trends, challenges, and opportunities in AI. Discover how you can leverage AI to create smarter, more efficient applications that drive real value for your customers.

  3. Certification for Partner Apps Using Generative AI Hub

    • Learn about SAP Generative AI and how your applications can achieve certification. This session will provide insights into the certification process, its benefits, and how it can help you stand out in a competitive market.

  4. Q&A

    • Have questions? We’ve got answers. Our experts will be available to address any queries you have about AI, certification, or how to maximize your partnership with SAP.

 

Why Attend?

  • Gain Expert Insights: Hear from AI specialists who will share their knowledge and experience in the field.
  • Understand Certification: Learn how to certify your AI-driven applications, giving you a competitive edge.
  • Get Your Questions Answered: Our Q&A session ensures you leave the webinar with all the information you need.

Register Now!

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to stay ahead in the rapidly evolving world of AI. Secure your spot today by [Registering Here].

We look forward to seeing you there!

entry.title: Re: select from cust. table using SAP CPQ 2.0 - How to Us...
entry.content:
Hello Amgad-El-Stohi!

I recommend raising a case with the SAP CPQ support team to thoroughly investigate the issue you're encountering. At first glance, the tag seems to be correct, and there haven't been any documented changes to table tags in this release. However, the issue could potentially be related to the 2408 release.

To facilitate the investigation, please include all relevant details in your case submission, such as reproduction steps, proxy access to your tenant, and any other pertinent details.
Support team will be glad to help you!

entry.title: Re: Gross profit Base Price not showing
entry.content: Hello!

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ 2.0 - How to Use " Table Tags " to get data i...
entry.content:
Hello Amgad-El-Stohi!

I recommend raising a case with the SAP CPQ support team to thoroughly investigate the issue you're encountering. At first glance, the tag seems to be correct, and there haven't been any documented changes to table tags in this release. However, the issue could potentially be related to the 2408 release.

To facilitate the investigation, please include all relevant details in your case submission, such as reproduction steps, proxy access to your tenant, and any other pertinent details.

If this is the exact same of select from cust. table using SAP CPQ 2.0 - How to... - SAP Community, only one case is needed to investigate.

Support team will be glad to help you!

entry.title: Re: Gross profit Base Price not showing
entry.content:
Hello!
To better address your issue, we recommend creating a support case for the SAP Support team. This will enable them to analyze your issue thoroughly and provide a more accurate solution.

1922545 - How to create the perfect support case for SAP Technical Support. LINK: https://me.sap.com/notes/192254

entry.title: Count function in webi
entry.content:
I'm having trouble with a seemingly simple formula in webi

I am trying to count the number of times a username appears in the list. When ther are multiple usernames in the username object, they will have a diffent position number. Below is a sample of the data:

UsernamePosition NumberCount 
JDOE12345 
JDOE54321 

I have tried the following formulas but keep getting a result of 1 when there are more than 1 
=count([Username])
=count([Username]) foreach ([Position Number])
=count([Username]) forall ([Position Number])
I have also tried reversing Username and Position Number as well adding the sum function in front. 

I'm hoping someone has some advice on what I am doing wrong or something else I could try. 

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: Can customers expand default memory size?
entry.content: Thank you for the answer. I understood the GROW Service Use Description.

entry.title: Re: Can customers expand default memory size?
entry.content: I got the answer for the second question. I will separately post the first question and close this Q&A.

entry.title: Reading of IP Address and check if it is whitelisted in the key value mapping in SAP APIM
entry.content:
Dear Team,
I have a requirement where i need to check the IP address is whitelisted or not using KeyValueMapping in SAP APIM.
My customer will trigger the request from their application. In my case i am using the postman. As a part of header i am able to see the IP Address which is getting stored in the header X-Forwarded for. Now i need to check if the IP Address is present in the key value map if it exists then i need to proceed with the next steps. Other wise it should throw the error as invalid IP. I have defined the value mapping as well with list of ip addresses. If I am using the parameter from postman then it is checking the key and accordingly it is giving the results. But my customer will not pass any parameter. So i need to store the IP address and check in the key value maps dynamically. Please help me on this with steps. 

Regards
Santosh

Does the default memory size of 100GB apply to all customer production systems?
How can a customer request to expand the memory size more than 100 GB if required?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Services offered as Trial Version
entry.content:
I am working with BTP trial account and went through the CAP Java tutorial (https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-cap-java-deploy-cf.html). I have it working and now want to figure out a way to access the API from postman. With the default IDP service (SAP ID Service), I am forced to do 2-Factor authentication and cannot test APIs from postman. So I am exploring creating an trial tenant of SAP Cloud Identity Services and use it. I created an user in the trial tenant.

Now I was hoping that without 2FA, I would be able to authenticate the new user and access the application API endpoint. But I get the below 'MAIL_NOT_VERIFIED' error even though I have verified the email. I can even login as that user in the UI and administer the tenant. The user profile also indicates that Email is verified. Any ideas why it is not working? Is this a restriction on trial account?

 

Thanks a lot in advance for any pointers!

ClientId, secret, xsuaa-authentication-endpoint are retrieved from the xsuaa service instance bound to my app. 

 

curl --location 'https://<xsuaa-authentication-endpoint>.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \
--data-urlencode 'client_id=<clientId>' \
--data-urlencode 'client_secret=<secret>' \
--data-urlencode 'grant_type=password' \
--data-urlencode 'username=<email id of user created in custom tenant>' \
--data-urlencode 'password=<password>'
{
    "error": "invalid_client",
    "error_description": "{\"error\":\"invalid_grant\",\"error_description\":\"User authentication failed: MAIL_NOT_VERIFIED\"}"
}

 

Thanks

Prasanna

entry.title: Re: How to create a Fiori Elements App for a RAP BO with Transport Selection
entry.content:
@patrick_winkler 

I've created an app as per your blog. However, we need to modify the table entries in production and hence I've commented out the lines where it requires transport selection. Tried this in a working client and all works well.

I've tested this in a client where the status has been set to non modifiable (as it would be in production) and i'm getting this error:

Tried the SOBJ route, but no dice. Can you kindly guide on how I can rectify this please?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: No PO without PR
entry.content:
Hi!

In S4 Hana Public Cloud, currently, there is no standard configuration (SSCUI) to be able to make a PR mandatory for PO (This is possible via configuration in On-premise). 

For your requirement of making PR mandatory for PO, you will have to do BADI extensions which has been described by Eric in the other answer above.

 

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: How to create a Fiori Elements App for a RAP BO with Transport Selection
entry.content: @smok1  what is your environment? I have no problem for btp abap system(production one)

entry.title: Re: How to create a Fiori Elements App for a RAP BO with Transport Selection
entry.content: @junwu S4 hana cloud private cloud edition - it works only in open client, not closed client. I want to modify it directly in closed client (production) without a transport.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Hello David

I wanted to start by saying thank you for recently assisting my daughter Sakura (Cherry Blossom) with SAP information for women. We went through the links provided, unfortunately Sakura is a little too young (at present) and found the content difficult. Therefore, we will revisit this opportunity soon, after she graduates.

I however, was impressed by the SAP Initiative and wish to pursue (if possible) please

I identify as a person in the category:

    • Single parent 

I have successfully completed Project Management courses previously, but Im unfortunately unemployed at present and am hoping the SAP Activate certification, will kick start my future job opportunities.

I have identified this learning journey Discovering SAP Activate - Agile Project Delivery https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-sap-activate-agile-project-delivery as I possible “best match”

Any assistance would be appreciated

Thank you in advance

Leon

entry.title: Re: We can't post goods issue with error.
entry.content:
Please check the delivery header text in your delivery document
Menu>Header Details>Texts tab

 

 

You might see text type "Dummy" .

 

 

 

Next , please check the configurations for "Text Determination" in your CBC.
SSCUI ID: 101291 Set Up Text Determination for Delivery Header
Choose Text Determination Procedure: "T6" and double click on "Text IDs in Procedure" in the tree structure on your left hand side.

 

 

 

Now you might see text type Dummy with "Text Is Mandatory". Change the Text Is Mandat. field into "Text Is Not Mandatory".

entry.title: Re: How to determine the date a quote item was last modif...
entry.content:
Hi,

For Quote 1.0, the best approach seems to be using an item custom field to log the last modified date. Alternatively, you could use a product attribute to capture the item's last configuration change date. The recommended triggers to update this information are OnItemAdded and OnItemUpdated.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: How can I get PR number in ME52N?
entry.content:
I have an enhancement in ME52N to add a header tab. However, I use below coding to get PR number but failed.

      DATA:  ls_mereqheader TYPE REF TO cl_po_header_handle_mm.
      DATA: lt_header TYPE mepoheader.

      CREATE OBJECT ls_mereqheader.

      CALL METHOD ls_mereqheader->get_data
        IMPORTING
          ex_data = lt_header.

OR

      DATA: dynpfields TYPE TABLE OF dynpread.
      CALL FUNCTION 'DYNP_VALUES_READ'
        EXPORTING
          dyname               = 'SAPLMEGUI' "sy-repid
          dynumb               = '3327'   "sy-dynnr
*         TRANSLATE_TO_UPPER   = ' '
*         REQUEST              = ' '
*         PERFORM_CONVERSION_EXITS             = ' '
*         PERFORM_INPUT_CONVERSION             = ' '
*         DETERMINE_LOOP_INDEX = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_IN_CURRENT_SCREEN       = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_IN_MAIN_SCREEN          = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_IN_STACKED_SCREEN       = ' '
*         START_SEARCH_ON_SCR_STACKPOS         = ' '
*         SEARCH_OWN_SUBSCREENS_FIRST          = ' '
*         SEARCHPATH_OF_SUBSCREEN_AREAS        = ' '
        TABLES
          dynpfields           = dynpfields
        EXCEPTIONS
          invalid_abapworkarea = 1
          invalid_dynprofield  = 2
          invalid_dynproname   = 3
          invalid_dynpronummer = 4
          invalid_request      = 5
          no_fielddescription  = 6
          invalid_parameter    = 7
          undefind_error       = 8
          double_conversion    = 9
          stepl_not_found      = 10
          OTHERS               = 11.
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
      ENDIF.

What is wrong for the above coding? or any other way to get the PR number? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Enclose Table entries in a TR
entry.content: In addition to above steps, should i goto SM30 & select all entries & add in the same TR?

entry.title: Re: Fixing Screenshot Size and Border while publishing si...
entry.content:
Hi @AngadJadhav 

There is no global settings that will let you to change the Image Size value for already created simulations. But you can change the value of Image Size for each simulations. To do that,

1. Open the simulation in producer and click Edit menu.
2. Select "Select Macros by Type" option.
3. Select Screen option and click OK.
4. Now all the screens are selected and then expand Documentation section.
5. Modify the Image Size (%) value.

Repeat above steps for all the simulations.

Important Note: This method only works if the value of Image Size is same for all the screens.

entry.title: Re: Requirement: Create an Email Alert if an Inbound EDI...
entry.content: Hi Ryan, I have started my journey on learning about SAP WorkFlows, this is a new area of SAP for me that I diddnt know was possible. I have not solved my initial problem yet but thanks for pointing myself in the right direction.

entry.title: Re: SAC Foreach restricted by time
entry.content: @Deb_D

entry.title: Re: How can you share Enable Now content with external su...
entry.content:
1. Convert the SEN contents into EXE format and you can share across. This is recommended but the disadvantage is the higher memory consumption if the number of contents is huge.

2. If the content is only simulation, then convert the simulation to MP4 video and share them. (This is a tedious process if the number of contents is huge where you need to convert each simulations to video).

entry.content: I see. So the problem is not in missing time-tables, but in missing field day of week. Re-creating of the time-tables will not help Nicolas (background script) and you cannot alter the views. I guess OSS-Incident / Call is needed to ask for the change of the script.

entry.title: Re: Delivery Complete Indicator of PO and Goods Receipt

entry.title: Re: Issues with Master Data Transfer from ERP HANA Cloud...
entry.content: Hi Manoel, I appreciate your helpful comments! The issue with the missing BOM information has been resolved by adjusting SAP_COM_0519 settings. I set the Output Mode to 'D' and the Replication Mode to 'I,' based on the document you suggested. After making these changes, the BOM information started appearing in the routings. I'm not entirely sure if that was the root cause of the issue, though.

entry.title: Re: MDK: Problem accessing the value of a field
entry.content: Could it be that the new property was only added in the one system and not another or is this all using the same backend system?

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 CLOUD 外部网络访问设置
entry.content: 2710842这个note找不到了，有知道note相关内容的吗？ I can't find note 2710842.And who know this note include what?  If  i  want to limit  web  to log  SAP(only  log  SAP  from inner ), whether  have other ways  to  solve this  problem?

entry.title: Re: How can you share Enable Now content with external su...
entry.content:
Hi KLC,

If you want to provide direct access to the content you can create manual user accounts in the Administration > Users screen in Manager.  This will allow you to distribute a user name and password to the external users that will allow them to access the content.  You can create Assignments on block of content to assign the corresponding content to a specific group of external users and this content can then be accessed through the Learner View tab in Manager.

If you have turned on SSO in Manager, the external users cannot be authenticated but they can access the manual login screen for your Enable Now system using a modified URL.  For example, if your standard Enable Now URL is https://customerABC.enable-now.cloud.sap/ the external users could access the manual login screen using https://customerABC.enable-now.cloud.sap/formlogin/

The advantage of this approach is that you can track the consumption of content by the external users.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Custom naming rules and hash algorithms supported in payment medium files
entry.content: You can also change payment file name in SAP S4/HANA On-Premise versions in Event 21. For more information, see SAP Note 1234970 - File name for PMW payment medium files/logical name - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: ES接口数据创建时间如何更改为用户所在时区
entry.content: Hello, 如果是导入数据，那么时间转换应该在导入之前的payload中准备好。 如果是导出，那么就应该在导出后进行处理。 API没有设定时区的功能。 Best Regards, Owen

entry.title: Re: Public cloud transport from on premise 1909
entry.content:
Hello,

Unfortunately, that's not supported.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: How do you add header text to RFQ Form
entry.content: Added Procure tag, please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Can custom mail notification be configured for each one of the custom tasks in offboarding.
entry.content:
The requirement is we have around 8 custom tasks developed for offboarding. The custom tasks are Finance, Admin clearance, Supervisor clearance, Library clearance etc. For these each custom tasks a mail should trigger for the stake holders with different mail body. 

Now with the standard custom mail notification, only we can customize the mail body, but the same mail will trigger to all the custom task stake holders.

If anyone as configured this kind of requirement, request you to share the ideas or solution.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: The New Master Data Integration Service for SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:

how is SAP MDI positioned in an environment with SF EC and S/4HANA private cloud? Is BIB replication via CPI still the recommended SF employee master data integration solution for on-prem and PCE  ?

entry.title: Re: How to Use Custom Fields for Pricing in Sales Documents
entry.content:
@CE6 Thanks for the update. 

We are using On Prem 2023 version of S/4. 

As recommended, if we extend the sales document and then pass it to pricing via the mentioned business scenario, all the custom fields are created in both VBAK and VBAP tables, which we don't want as there is no further usage of these fields. 

 

USEREXIT_PRICING_PREPARE_TKOMK we still can use to map the data, but want to know is there any better way to pass the data to these fields?  

Thanks,

Kiran

entry.title: Re: CKR1 timing issue
entry.content: Hi Jessica, thank you for the guidance but the only ones with access to notes is our consultants, and they won't share them with us. Unfortunately they are also not very good at solving our problems, hence why I am trying to get external advice. Stymied at every turn by looks. Thanks for your help anyway.

entry.title: Re: Return the System Status from ORAP (Order Approved) t...
entry.content: Hello Alvin, with the current version of SAP S/4HANA Cloud,public edition the cost approval workflow for maintenance orders is only available at the approval phase as you know. With the phase control settings ,even after the order is approved you can still activate the approved phase and block the preparation phase so that order cannot be released yet. This is one way you can have a check on unplanned components which can be reviewed before the order is released for next step. Alternatively, you can check for reports (either standard or custom) which can give a view on new components added contributing to huge, planned costs. Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Hi, Task 2 completed.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Here is my Solution:

entry.title: SAP MM Pricing procedure standard routine usage list
entry.content:
Hello SAP expert,

I am curious on information availability about SAP MM pricing procedure and its standard routine available .

Very often due to my lack of knowledge , I used to go for customized routine creation instead for using already available standard one.SO I am interested to know is there any SAP note or any information site where i can check the standard routine and its purpose so that before proceeding for any customized one, I can check that list to determine whether available routine serve my purpose.

Thanks and Regards

Tapas

entry.title: Green field vs Brown field approach with Margin analysis COPA
entry.content:
Hello community,


Could you clarify whether the transformation approach from ECC to SAP HANA with no other significant changes or improvements, but includes changing from costing-based COPA to Margin Analysis 
is still considered a brownfield approach or greenfield?

My understanding is that a brownfield approach involves migrating the existing setup to HANA as part of an technical upgrade. Does this brownfield approach also cover new COPA margin analysis, and how will the existing data and configuration be migrated into margin analysis under this approach?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How to get Number of Pay Periods
entry.content:
If my understanding of scenario is correct you can try checking an mdf object "Pay Calendar" which can store the pay periods of ECP in EC.  To copy the pay periods from ECP and upload in EC, there is a program in ECP, you can use T-code "HRSFEC_PAY_CALENDAR" and this will export the pay periods in EC uploadable format and you can upload all pay periods using import data

not sure if this program still works

you check below blog - 

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-successfactors-employee-central-managing-payroll-relevant-data-changes/ba-p/13388440

entry.title: Re: Good to Know- Enable easy create from object detail view ( + QCButtonMenu)
entry.content:
Hi @delateja ,

Could you please assist me with the following case?

I want to enable the "Phone Calls" and "Appointment" activities creation buttons under the QCButton menu for the Service BO, which are currently not available in the standard setup.

How can we enable this in the Service Ticket + QCButton menu?

Thank you in advance for your response.

entry.title: CDS View for Routing Operation Overview
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have a task which is to create an Analytical Query based on the view Display Routing: Operation Overview. I can't seem to find the corresponding CDS View for the task. May I ask if there is a CDS View for this app or it is not available?

Many thanks,

Lam

entry.title: Adobe Forms external image is not rendered
entry.content:
I am trying to put an external image on an ADOBE forms. Therefore, I created a form that contains one element, which is an image node with binding to the only parameter of the form. To print, I created the following report:

 

 

  call function 'GUI_UPLOAD'
    exporting
      filename   = filename
      filetype   = 'BIN'
    importing
      filelength = flen
    tables
      data_tab   = upload_file.

  image type xstring.

  call function 'SCMS_BINARY_TO_XSTRING'
    exporting
      input_length = flen
    importing
      buffer       = image
    tables
      binary_tab   = upload_file.

  data(out) = value sfpoutputparams( preview = abap_true ).
  call function 'FP_JOB_OPEN'
    changing
      ie_outputparams = out.
      
  call function '/1BCDWB/SM00000142'
    exporting
      binary = image.

  call function 'FP_JOB_CLOSE'.

 

 

Running this program and uploading a JPG image the form shows with an empty image. Where do I go wrong?

entry.title: Re: How to unlock locked data , Tables or Configuration ?

entry.title: Re: /801 split in case of change in pay during a month
entry.content: Have you checked the option to use RT3 Operation in facotring Check the documentation of the followng operation in PE04

entry.title: Re: 合并报表的所有者权益变动表怎么实现
entry.content:
你好，

SAP标准功能无法自动出具合并所有者权益变动表。

只能通过合并资产负债表手工分析填写合并所有者权益变动表

同时可以借助Group reporting的Fiori应用Define Reporting Rules 的功能。

Regards,

Sen

I created a trial account for Integration Suite a few days ago, where I created several flows for my learning purposes. However, when I logged into my account today, it showed a "subscription failed" status. I have attached the error screen for your reference. Can you please help me with this?

Ajay

entry.title: Focused Build- Checklist Functionality Improvements and Decision Based Checklist
entry.content:
This blog focuses on improvements and features added in the checklist functionality in the Generic Application (My Work Packages/My Work Items etc..) and My Checklist Steps of Focused Build. With ST-OST SP14, we have added the cancel button for simple checklist and also introduced decision-based checklist.

Simple Checklist - Cancel Button available for Optional Steps 

The cancel button is now available for optional steps of a checklist. Once we press the cancel button, the step status is set to "Rejected" and it is disabled for any further changes.

Decision Based Checklist and Execution based on Triggers

First step which is displayed when selection a decision-based checklist is the one which has initial flag marked in the customizing. All steps of the decision-based checklist are assigned some triggers in the customizing. The step status can only be changed via selection of some trigger. If trigger has "finalize" flag marked, then the step associated with it after trigger execution will be set to completed. Based on trigger selected next step is also determined. If the finalize flag is not set, step status remains same, and checklist execution is halted there itself. All this can be set in the customizing: 

Here, I have selected a decision-based checklist, and you can see that only one step is displayed, which is the initial step defined in the customizing.

Once, I select this step and go to the customizing option "Assign Triggers", here I have already defined some triggers for this step and the same will also be seen in status dropdown for the step after the partner function has been assigned. Also, note that there is a next step associated with each trigger value.

Once I select the trigger "Unconfirmed" and press on save, you will see the next step is visible and the first step status is set to completed.

My Checklist Steps Application Enhancements

"Rejected" status is also included in the "Status (Step)" dropdown now and filtering on this status is also possible now.

Please feel free to provide feedback either directly here in the comment section or you can also post your questions. You are also encouraged to follow SAP Solution Manager tag here and Focused Build for SAP Solution Manager tag here.

Related Links

Focused Build for Solution Manager

Agile Project Delivery with Focused Build for SAP Solution Manager

Unwrapping the Latest Innovations: Support Package... - SAP Community

Focused Build SP14: Enhancements in Generic applic... - SAP Community

Focused Build SP14: General improvements in Mass C... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: How does Half day holiday displayed in table TFACS
entry.content:
Hi Martin

 

Sorry for my late response

I did replicate the table to DSP but I fail to understand how to add a column for Half day
the base table has a column for each month MON01, MON02 etc. I need to be able to have half days in the same columns
I would also want to be able to continue using the standard date functions of WORKDAYS_BETWEEN etc. and I believe that with new column they will not work

Regards

Shlomi

entry.title: SAP Build Apps bulk updating backend tables with an Array or records
entry.content:
Hi, I am learning Build Apps, have successfully integrated with an API, parsing the JSON and updated app variables to display on a page.  The app variables structure include list of objects.

What i am struggling with is updating back end table with a list of objects.  I can see examples of working via the front end for single record updates and creation, which make sense.

i am just wondering if anyone has any guidance on a bulk update of a backend tables.  Where i am taking a list of objects app variable and then updating the table with multiple rows.  My attempts seem to be failing.

entry.title: Re: How does Half day holiday displayed in table TFACS

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA 2.0 installation error SLES 12 2
entry.content:
I just hit this problem on SLES 15SP5 attempting to install plug-in sap_afl_sdk_apl on an SPS7 HDB.

As the OP said, I had done this exact thing several times, but this particular server would not play ball.

When I copied the installation media off the NFS where I had it  and made it local, it worked.  I guess there is a problem with the NFS mount, or hdblcm doesn't play with NFS files nicely.  I didn't investigate any further after solving this issue FWIW.

Before resolution, my log showed:

17:29:17.586 - INFO: Installing Automated Predictive Library...
17:29:17.586 - INFO: Detecting known command line options
17:29:17.586 - INFO: Getting external program configuration
17:29:17.597 - ERR : Cannot get external program configuration
17:29:17.597 - INFO: /softdump/HANA_77/SAPPAAPL4_2203_2-80004547/installer/hdbinst: Permission denied
17:29:17.598 - ERR : Cannot detect command line options dynamically.

Regards, 

Shilpa Verma

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud - Segmentation (LO-SGT) Function Confirmation
entry.content:
Dear all,

Right now we are facing following business requirement and its background is as following:

  1. Background: For different FERT product (FERT A & FERT B) have common raw material called ROH 1. Both FERTs are manufactured through external manufacturing (EM) process (Subcontracting). For convenience, raw material ROH1 will be sent to different subcontractor (EM) directly. So they use storage location in PR to identify each EM. 
  2. As-Is (Right now process W/O segment function): Right now, users will create P.I.R for FERT A & FERT B, and after MRP run, the PR for ROH1 will be combined into one PR when required date is same. In order to fulfill their requirement (ROH sent to EM directly), they need to manually change PR, either create new line item or just manually create a new PR with different storage location (for EM). This methods need much manually work and check
  3. Required function (Process below with Segment): We hope enable standard segment function in SAP public cloud, and set different subcontractor (EM) as Segment. Thus, when we create P.I.R, we can use maintain segment to identify different requirement. And with segment, after MRP run, system should auto generate 2 different PR for different EM.

Right now, in SAP Public Cloud, we do not find any configuration point to activate segment function. Can you please help us on this?

Thanks a lot
